name: mcp-enterprise-managed-auth
description: POC: MCP Enterprise-Managed Authorization (ID-JAG) — enterprise IdP-driven access control via OAuth 2.0 token exchange

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:idp && npm run install:server && npm run install:client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:idp" "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client"

author: starman69
